reviews.comment:
Que lugar magnífico para parar y tomarse un rico café de camino,tiene sillas en la parte de afuera para tomar algo o comer en el solcito. Adentro es bien confortable y espacioso con lugares para cargar el celular,me encanta parar acá !

(Translated by Google)
What a wonderful place to stop and enjoy a delicious coffee on the road! It has chairs outside where you can have a drink or a meal in the sunshine. Inside, it's very comfortable and spacious with places to charge your phone. I love stopping here!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZeDZtSk13EAE

reviews.comment:
Servicio de descanzo y comida para salir de la ruta despues de un viaje largo.
Tiene servicio de carga de combustible ypf full, baños, mesas y sillas,en el exterior a el lado cuenta con sector al aire libre con mesas, sillas, sacar al perro y lugar de estacionamiento a sus alrededores hay lugares para comer y puestos de comida

(Translated by Google)
Rest and lunch service to get off the road after a long trip.
It offers YPF full fuel service, restrooms, tables and chairs. Outside, there is an outdoor area with tables and chairs, dog walking, and parking. There are places to eat and food stalls nearby.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbktueXR3RRAB
